per_scenario.one_line_critique: The agent entered an infinite loop of redundant SQL queries and failed to provide any response or show judgment.
The agent entered a catastrophic runaway loop of repetitive tool calls and failed to provide any answer to the second question.
The agent entered a catastrophic runaway loop of redundant tool calls and failed to acknowledge the dashboard it had already created.
Leads directly with the answer using strong, evaluative language without unnecessary preamble or tool narration.
